notes: Електроенергиен товар и производство, разглеждан като индиректен драйвер за натиск върху водни ресурси в Европа.

data.text_sample:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
    <meta name="google" content="notranslate">
    <title>Transparency Platform</title>

    
    <script>
        if (!location.href.match(/^(about:|file:)/)) {
          var bplCookie = document.cookie.match(/(^|;\s*)uu\.app\.bpl=([^;]+)/);
          var bplSegmentCount = (bplCookie ? Number(bplCookie[2]) : null);
          if (typeof bplSegmentCount !== "number" || isNaN(bplSegmentCount) || bplSegmentCount < 0) bplSegmentCount = 2;
          var appBaseUrlPath = (location.pathname.split(/\//).slice(0,1+bplSegmentCount).join("/")+"/").replace(/\/+/g,"/").replace(/"/g,"");
          var appAssetsRelativeUrlPath = "public/1.44.7/";
          document.write('<base href="' + appBaseUrlPath + appAssetsRelativeUrlPath + '" data-uu-app-base="' + appBaseUrlPath + '" data-uu-app-assets-base="' + appAssetsRelativeUrlPath + '">');
        }
      </script>

    <script>document.write("<script src=\"uu5-environment.js\"><"+"/script>");</script>
    <script>
      var cdnBaseUri = ((window.UU5 || {}).Environment || {}).cdnBaseUri || "https://cdn.plus4u.net";
      if (cdnBaseUri.endsWith("/")) cdnBaseUri = cdnBaseUri.slice(0, -1);
    </script>

    <script>document.write("<script src=\"./lib/uu5g05-browser-compatibility-1.38.5/uu5g05-browser-compatibility.min.js\" crossorigin=\"anonymous\"><"+"/script>");</script>

    <script>document.write("<link type=\"text/css\" rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"./lib/uu_gdsg01-unicorn-1.15.0/assets/font.min.css\">");</script>
    <script>document.write("<link type=\"text/css\" rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"loading.css\">");</script>
    
    
    <script>document.write("<script src=\"./lib/uu5loaderg01-1.8.1/uu5loaderg01.min.js\" crossorigin=\"anonymous\"><"+"/script>");</script>

    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="usyTpgui">
    <meta name="application-name" content="usyTpgui">



    <script>document.write("<link rel=\"icon\" type=\"image/png\" href=\"" + appBaseUrlPath + appAssetsRelativeUrlPath + "assets/meta/favicon-entsoe.png\" sizes=\"32x32\">");</script>
    <script>document.write("<link rel=\"icon\" type=\"image/png\" href=\"" + appBaseUrlPath + appAssetsRelativeUrlPath + "assets/meta/favicon-entsoe.png\" sizes=\"16x16\">");</script>


    
    <style>
      #uu5-portal-modal > aside {
        background-color: transparent !important;
        background-image: linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(39,48,106,.5),rgba(27,129,111,.5)) !important;
      }
    </style>
